DISCOVERY 610, APPEARANCES: J. E. B. PICKETT FOR PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY: LAURA FUQUA LEO H. SCHUERING FOR DEFENDANT AND OPPOSING PARTY: HUMPHREY OGG HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE UNTIMELY RESPONSES AND TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET #2 IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT MADE A MOTION AND IS THEREFORE NOT ENTITLED TO RELIEF PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 2030(K). FURTHERMORE, THE COURT NOTES THAT THE INTERROGATORY WAS SERVED ON NOVEMBER 3, 2004 AND THAT THE STATED REASON FOR THE LATE RESPONSE OCCURRED AFTER THE TIME TO RESPOND HAD ELAPSED. THE FAILURE TO RESPOND IN A TIMELY FASHION WAS NOT THE RESULT OF MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S OFFER TO STIPULATE TO THE USE OF A THIRD-PARTY NOTICE ADMINISTRATOR, DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE THE REQUESTED INFORMATION WITHIN 7 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO THE SELECTION AND USE OF THE ADMINISTRATOR. THE REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCES. DEFENDANT LASERVUE EYE CENTER'S JOINDER ON MOTION TO SET EXPERT WITNESS FEE. OFF CALENDAR, UNDERLYING MOTION WAS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
